<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 250; 150; 600; 2250; 3400
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Higher Caliber; Precise Aiming; Golden Deagle; Double Tap
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3032133716; 115730014; 3278741672; 3279537687
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 2;
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.8 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.5 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.5 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 1.2 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 0.6 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
